title: Synapse — browser deep-learning lab
description: A deep-learning framework built from scratch on a real reverse-mode tensor autograd engine (no TensorFlow.js) — 25+ hand-derived ops including LayerNorm, BatchNorm, dropout, GELU/SiLU and a full softmax Jacobian, all proven correct by a one-click engine self-test that gradchecks every one to ~1e-9. Sketch a net with normalization/dropout/residual layers, train it live on 2-D datasets (two-spirals, checkerboard, …) with AdamW/Nesterov, LR schedules and gradient clipping, and watch decision boundaries, per-neuron feature maps, train-vs-validation curves, per-layer weight/gradient norms and a live computation graph update each step. Save, load and share any experiment via a URL link.
